display.purpose: Hero headlines and main page titles.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Page and large section fade reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #111111; color: #F7F3EA; padding: 14px 32px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #C6A15B; color: #111111; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #C6A15B; color: #111111; padding: 14px 32px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #111111; color: #C6A15B; }

narrative.overview: The CROPUS visual system is built on the metaphor of a premium, traditional agricultural field-notebook. It rejects the hyper-clean, sterile SaaS layout language, opting instead for a tactile, editorial layout that feels grounded, authentic, and scientifically authoritative.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment-like backgrounds and earthy forest tints.
Strong typographic contrast using editorial serif and technical monospace fonts.
Restrained, flat containers utilizing thin dividers and background tone shifts instead of ambient shadows.
Generous editorial spacing to allow content to breathe.

rules.name: The Editorial Restraint Rule
rules.body: Layouts should rely on typography and whitespace to create hierarchy. Visual decoration and container shapes should be kept to a bare minimum.

rules.name: The Golden Ratio Rule
rules.body: The primary Muted Gold accent color must never occupy more than 10% of any screen surface. It serves as a rare, high-value highlight.

rules.name: The Typographic Balance Rule
rules.body: Every major section heading must be preceded by an uppercase monospaced label kicker to anchor the hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces and containers are flat at rest. Ambient shadows are prohibited; subtle solid borders are the only allowed boundary indicators.

dos: Do use text-wrap: balance on all h1–h3 headings to prevent awkward line wraps.
Do maintain a body text line length of 65–75ch for optimal readability.
Do use Warm Ivory (#F7F3EA) and Soft Cream (#EFE8DC) for page layouts to maintain the warm paper feel.
Do use thin, subtle dividers (1px solid #D9D6D0 or #c3c8c2/30) to separate sections.
donts: Don't use drop shadows, box shadows, or glassmorphism effects.
Don't use neon or vibrant digital colors (pure reds, blues, greens, or purples).
Don't use side-stripe borders (e.g. border-left-4 as a decorative accent).
Don't use gradient text or background-clip text.
Don't use identical, repeating card grids without visual variation or editorial asymmetry.
